originalTitle: ServiceNow, Salesforce and other software stocks surge as the OpenAI threat weakens
summary: Oracle’s stock missed out on the broader software rally, as the company is tied to OpenAI’s success through its cloud-infrastructure business.
content: Oracle’s stock missed out on the broader software rally, as the company is tied to OpenAI’s success through its cloud-infrastructure business.
chineseTitle: 随着 OpenAI 威胁减弱，ServiceNow、Salesforce 和其他软件股飙升
chineseSummary: 甲骨文的股票错过了更广泛的软件上涨，因为该公司通过其云基础设施业务与 OpenAI 的成功息息相关。
chineseContent: 甲骨文的股票错过了更广泛的软件上涨，因为该公司通过其云基础设施业务与 OpenAI 的成功息息相关。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
